description: Perform a quarterly cluster resource hygiene audit in the 'platform-services' namespace. Over multiple sprints, developers have left behind orphaned resources (stale Jobs, unreferenced ConfigMaps, and unused Secrets) alongside active production workloads. Use the cleanup checklist located at /home/ga/Desktop/cleanup_checklist.md to identify and delete all orphaned resources while ensuring that all actively-used resources and their dependent configurations are preserved. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
